Why Choose Us

Built for your journey

Authentically Islamic

Grounded in Quranic verses and authentic Islamic teachings, not generic content.

Private & Secure

Just your name and PIN. No data sharing, no ads, no tracking. Privacy guaranteed.

Always Free

Full access to all features. No premium tiers, no hidden costs, forever free.

Community Focused

Share your journey, inspire others, build accountability with your community.

Beautifully Designed

Premium 1080x1080px flyers with professional Islamic design and your name featured.

Offline Capable

Install as a PWA on your home screen. Works offline, syncs when connected.

Questions

Frequently asked

How does the AI generate reflections?+

We use advanced AI trained on Islamic knowledge to generate authentic Quranic-based reflections. Each one is unique, meaningful, and spiritually resonant.

Can I preview before sharing?+

Yes. The flyer preview shows exactly how it will look when shared. You can regenerate if you want a different reflection.

How do I install as an app?+

Visit https://www.ramadanbot.app/app on your mobile browser. Tap "Add to Home Screen" in your menu, and install like a native app.

Will my personal info appear on flyers?+

Only your name appears on the flyer. No email, phone, or sensitive data is included. Your privacy is our priority.

What if I miss a day in my streak?+

Your streak resets, but every day is a new opportunity. Use Ramadan Bot to get back on track and rebuild your consistency.

Is there a cost?+

No. Ramadan Bot is completely free—forever. 3 daily generations, unlimited sharing, beautiful designs. No premium tiers.

Ready?

Start your journey

Create your first reflection today. Free to use, no credit card required.
